email_1_subject: Are employees seeing the latest updates at every site?
email_1_body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Keeping every plant location showing the same current information is harder than it sounds. Safety notices, production targets, and shift updates often live in email or an intranet that floor teams rarely open.

Pickcel runs all your on-site screens from one dashboard, so the right thing shows up at every location.

Worth a quick look for {{company_name}}?

Hi {{first_name}},

Following up on my last note — most ops teams don't have a clean way to see what's on screen across sites right now.

Open to a short call?

Book a demo

Either way, thanks for reading.
